name: Fisaddi
overview: A final-year student Goldie gains local fame in Prayagraj despite failing exams. When his brilliant younger brother Vimal joins the same college, Goldie has to choose: match Vimal's success or accept the role as family's underachiever.

trailers.title: Fisaddi - Official Trailer | Bhuvan Arora, Priyal Mahajan, Poojan Chhabra | Amazon MX Player
